data.body:
Complete nonsense. Thankfully, NYC implemented the FARE Act last year. Basically, landlords can no longer pass that fee onto the tenants if they didn't hire the broker themselves.

Unfortunately, it's still all too common in North Jersey. No utilities, no laundry, no parking, and the place is tiny.
